tickets.subject: Commission payouts not calculated for Sunday's service
tickets.description: The stylist commission ledger does not reflect Sunday evening balayage treatment invoices. Please double check logic.

replies.text: Auditing treatment transactions database. Found 2 check-ins marked completed in local storage but pending payout calculation flag. Processing update.

tickets.subject: WhatsApp session expired, need to re-verify
tickets.description: The background broadcast queue returned an auth timeout. I cleared local wwebjs auth caches and scanned the QR code to re-link successfully.

replies.text: Checked local session database. Cleaned up browser-based cache directories. Status is verified.
